meaning: vt.[律]使有效,使生效,确认,证实,验证
examples: The Academy Awards appear to validate his career.
This discovery seems to validate the claims of popular astrology.
If I want to validate this code in a white box manner, I have to separate UI-specific code from business code, which requires some refactoring.
We naturally look for the self in others, and seek relationships that will validate our selves.
The challenge is to actually validate that your guess about the pain is real.
